rules.title: Icon-only tag must have an accessible label
rules.description: A tag with .tag--icon-only has no visible text. The accessible name must be provided via aria-label on the root span, or via .sr-only text inside the tag.
rules.expected: element has non-empty aria-label OR contains .sr-only with non-empty text

conditions: element contains .sr-only with non-empty trimmed text content

rules.message: Icon-only .tag is missing an accessible label. Add aria-label on the root span or a .sr-only text child.
rules.fix: Add aria-label="Describe the tag" to the root span element, or add Label as a child.

rules.title: Tag icon must have aria-hidden
rules.description: The .tag__icon slot wraps a decorative SVG. It must carry aria-hidden='true' to prevent redundant announcements by screen readers when visible text is also present.

conditions: element has aria-hidden attribute equal to 'true'

rules.message: .tag__icon is missing aria-hidden='true'. Screen readers may announce the SVG redundantly.

rules.title: Status Tag must always have visible text alongside the dot
rules.description: The .status-tag__dot uses color to convey state. Per WCAG 1.4.1, color alone must not be the sole means of conveying information. A visible .status-tag__text sibling is required. The dot must carry aria-hidden='true'.
rules.expected: contains .status-tag__text with non-empty text AND .status-tag__dot has aria-hidden='true'

conditions: element contains .status-tag__text with non-empty trimmed text content

rules.message: Status Tag is missing visible text or dot aria-hidden. The dot color alone does not satisfy WCAG 1.4.1.
rules.fix: Ensure .status-tag__text with visible text is present. Add aria-hidden="true" to .status-tag__dot.

rules.title: Tag root must be a <span> element
rules.description: Both .tag and .status-tag are non-interactive display components. The root element must be <span> (or an inline non-interactive element). Using <div>, <button>, <a>, or <li> as the root violates the component contract unless the tag is intentionally made interactive by the consuming application.
rules.message: .tag or .status-tag root is not a <span> element. Non-interactive labels must use <span>.
rules.fix: Change the root element to <span>. If the tag must be interactive (e.g., clickable/dismissible), consult the extended tag patterns in tag.contract.md §8.

rules.title: Tag must contain .tag__text or be icon-only
rules.description: A .tag element without .tag--icon-only must contain a .tag__text child with non-empty text. A .tag--icon-only without aria-label or .sr-only text is caught by TAG-A11Y-001.
rules.expected: element contains .tag__text with non-empty trimmed text content

check.condition: element does not have class tag--icon-only
conditions: element contains .tag__text with non-empty trimmed text content

rules.message: .tag is missing .tag__text content. Add a .tag__text child, or add .tag--icon-only if icon-only is intended.
rules.fix: Add Label as a child, or add class tag--icon-only to the root and provide aria-label.

rules.title: No hardcoded color, spacing, radius, or typography values in tag CSS
rules.description: All visual values in tag.css must reference CSS custom properties. Hardcoded hex colors, rgba values (except in the proposed :root token definitions), pixel dimensions, or font values in component selectors are prohibited.
rules.expected: no hardcoded visual values in .tag or .status-tag selectors
rules.message: Hardcoded visual value detected in tag.css component selector. Replace with a CSS custom property.
rules.fix: Define a component token (e.g., --tag-neutral-bg) in the :root block with the primitive token fallback, then reference it in the selector.

rules.title: No physical left/right padding or margin in tag component selectors
rules.description: tag.css must not use padding-left, padding-right, margin-left, or margin-right in component selectors. RTL must be handled via [dir='rtl'] flex-direction reversal. Padding-inline is acceptable for symmetric padding.
rules.expected: no padding-left, padding-right, margin-left, or margin-right in .tag or .status-tag selectors (excluding [dir='rtl'] rules)
rules.message: Physical directional padding or margin detected in tag.css. Replace with padding-inline or use [dir='rtl'] flex-direction reversal.
rules.fix: Replace padding-left/padding-right with padding-inline. Use [dir='rtl'] { flex-direction: row-reverse; } for visual RTL adaptation.

rules.title: Tag must not combine multiple style modifiers
rules.description: Only one style modifier should be applied to a .tag element at a time. Combining .tag--error with .tag--warning (or any two style modifiers) produces undefined visual behavior.
rules.expected: element has at most one style modifier from: tag--neutral (implicit), tag--error, tag--info, tag--success, tag--warning, tag--on-color
rules.message: Multiple style modifiers on .tag. Only one style modifier is allowed at a time.
rules.fix: Remove all but one style modifier from the element.

rules.title: Status Tag must not combine multiple status or style modifiers
rules.description: A .status-tag may have at most one style modifier (--blue, --green, --red, --yellow) and at most one status modifier (--ghost, --inverted). Combining multiple style or multiple status modifiers is invalid.
rules.expected: at most one style modifier AND at most one status modifier
rules.message: Multiple style or status modifiers on .status-tag. Only one of each is allowed.
rules.fix: Remove extra modifiers. Apply exactly one style and at most one status modifier.

rules.title: Component tokens must be moved from tag.css :root to token.css
rules.description: The :root block in tag.css defines proposed component tokens as a temporary measure. These must be extracted to token.css before production deployment. This rule tracks migration completion.
rules.message: Component tokens --tag-* and --status-tag-* are not yet in token.css. Migration from tag.css :root block is pending.
rules.fix: Move all --tag-* and --status-tag-* token definitions from tag.css :root block to token.css under a TAG component tokens section.
